text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the final day of summer camp. As I'm waiting
for Rice Shower to finish packing, I take a seat on
a nearby bench.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: S-sorry for making you wait!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: S-sorry for making you wait!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Whew... Ehehe. I got caught up helping out...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah. This camp has done a lot for me, right?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So I asked the administrator if I could do anything
to help... even though I only had a little bit of
time.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-not really... I couldn't do much, honestly.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Just watering flowers... repainting the benches...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yep! Even the one you're sitting on... now...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yep! Even the one you're sitting on... now...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rrrriiiip...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stand up in a panic, but the paint has already
come off the bench onto my clothes.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sorry! I should have left a note!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh no... What should we do? Ohhh...
choice_data_list: Guess we have to repaint it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh no... What should we do? Ohhh...
choice_data_list: Guess we have to repaint it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-okay... Sigh... I'm really sorry...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'll go apologize to the administrator as well.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure they're okay with us repainting it,
and get some paint while I'm at it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some things never change, while other aspects of
ourselves continuously evolve. If there's one thing
today has taught me, it's that.
